_comment: Example: pull SSH public keys from URLs (added v0.171.0). Default allowlist covers github.com, gitlab.com, codeberg.org, bitbucket.org, launchpad.net, api.github.com. Use sshKeyUrlAllowlist to extend; use leading '.' for subdomain match (e.g. '.internal.corp' allows a.internal.corp).

users.name: alice
users.comment: Alice -- keys pulled from her GitHub account

users.name: bob
users.comment: Bob -- mix of inline + URL keys

users.name: carol
users.comment: Carol -- internal corp keyserver via extended allowlist
